source: independent (non-author) general-purpose agent reviewing data/aggregates/build-reasoning.json against the source kit+items; suggested rewrites ground-checked by copy-verify, then applied back

support.quote: Build steady power and attack speed so Dekker can Stasis Bomb stun, wall them in with Containment Fence, and Ion Strike to burst the trapped target as support.
support.issue: no attack speed in this build's items
support.rewrite: Build steady power and cooldown so Dekker can Stasis Bomb stun, wall them in with Containment Fence, and Ion Strike to burst the trapped target as support.

support.quote: Jack-of-all-trades, master of none — Dekker pure utility caster — if her stuns miss she has no damage or escape.
support.rewrite: Jack-of-all-trades, master of none — Dekker is a pure utility caster, so if her stuns miss she has no damage or escape.
